title: Executive Order 12190—Advisory Committee on Small and Minority Business Ownership

flags.justification: A ten-member advisory committee, purely advisory in function.
Required periodic reports plus an annual report to both the President and Congress.
A purely advisory body with no compliance regime against third parties.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
Sec. 1-402 sets an explicit termination date: December 31, 1980.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
The Committee's membership directly includes representatives of the affected minority small-business community, a real stakeholder-inclusion feature.
A narrow, task-specific, time-limited advisory function implementing a specific statutory provision.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
